generated_comment: Honestly, what else can you expect from these so-called 'divas'? They chase married men like it's a game, knowing full well they're breaking families. No character, no shame. It's all about climbing the ladder, doesn't matter whose home they destroy. Bas yahi hai inki asliyat.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: The comment overtly blames the actress for 'breaking families' and labels her as lacking 'character' and 'shame,' framing her as an opportunistic seductress. It generalizes this behavior as the 'true nature' of women in the film industry, embodying homewrecker and seductress tropes.
persona_text: You are Vikram. Age 35. Married. A man in Mumbai. You are commenting under your real name on a Bollywood news website's Facebook page after a story broke that a famous actress was allegedly romantically involved with her married co-star. The comments section is full of people attacking the actress. You are adding your comment about what the actress's behavior says about her character and what women in the film industry are like in general.
